lines.speaker: Financial Wizard
lines.text: Good day, how may I help you?

lines.speaker: Financial Wizard
lines.text: This is a branch of the Bank of Gielinor. We have branches in many towns.

lines.speaker: Financial Wizard
lines.text: We will look after your items and money for you. Leave your valuables with us if you want to keep them safe.

lines.speaker: Financial Wizard
lines.text: Ah, we're special bankers who can access your safe deposit box on Deadman Worlds. Would you like to do that now?

lines.speaker: Financial Wizard
lines.text: You don't have any inventory space.

sections.title: Depositing at the Port Phasmatys ghost Financial Wizard without a ghostspeak item equipped
Attempting to access deposit-box while skulled
